common.noVoicesFound: No voices found for this engine and locale filter.

routes.monitor: Self-host monitor, logs and queue diagnostics

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.description: Keep the most frequent operator tasks visible: queue status, projects, results and failures.
dashboard.liveDescription: Recent operational events streamed over SSE.

createJob.title: Create synthesis job
createJob.description: Project-first flow: choose a project, pick an engine voice in a dedicated picker, then tune only the fields the provider needs.
createJob.projectContextFallback: Use projects to keep defaults, results and voice strategy together.
createJob.scriptHint: Use project defaults to reduce repeated setup.
createJob.advancedDescription: Only fields relevant to the selected engine are shown.
createJob.noAdvanced: This provider does not expose advanced controls in the current UI.
createJob.selectedVoiceDescription: Review the chosen engine, locale and preview availability before queueing.
createJob.voiceRequired: You need to select a voice before queueing a job.

jobsPage.title: Jobs
jobsPage.description: Monitor status, open audio, download results, and inspect job-level history without leaving the page.
jobsPage.detailDescription: Keep parameters, artifact access and event timeline together.
jobsPage.selectJob: Select a job to inspect its timeline and settings.

library.title: Results library
library.description: A dedicated place for completed audio helps users avoid hunting through the Jobs page.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.description: Turn the SSE stream into an operator-friendly inbox.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.description: Projects are the operational unit: defaults, ownership, results and monitoring all anchor here.
projectsPage.createDescription: Make setup reusable. Defaults here should remove steps from Create Job later.
projectsPage.name: Name

providersPage.title: Providers
providersPage.description: Use this page as the operational map for engine health, capability fit, and deployment readiness.

settingsPage.title: Workspace defaults
settingsPage.description: Keep high-frequency defaults project-scoped so users do less repeated configuration.
settingsPage.systemDescription: This page should become the home of diagnostics and environment-level settings.
settingsPage.hostDescription: Hardware detected on the API container. Use this to choose the right Docker Compose overlay.

voiceLab.title: Voice Lab
voiceLab.description: Plan cloning and custom voice flows before backend APIs arrive.
voiceLab.eligibleDescription: Only providers with cloning or custom-voice capability should appear here.
voiceLab.step1Body: Limit the list to engines that can create or clone voices.
voiceLab.step2Body: Reference audio, voice identity metadata and consent should live in one guided flow.
voiceLab.step3Body: Draft voices should support test prompts, QA checks and publish gates.
voiceLab.cloneResearchBody: Start with a draft-only workflow: consent → reference validation → test prompts → publish to project catalog. Do not mix cloning directly into the normal create-job form.
voiceLab.noEligible: No providers with custom voice support are currently configured.

voicesPage.title: Voice catalog
voicesPage.description: Use this page to compare engines, countries/locales, preview support, and voice traits.
voicesPage.detailDescription: Keep metadata and preview behavior visible while comparing across engines.
voicesPage.noVoice: Select a voice to inspect metadata and capabilities.

voicePicker.title: Voice engine & voice picker
voicePicker.description: Step 1: choose an engine. Step 2: narrow by country / locale. Step 3: compare voices with avatar, traits, and preview support.
voicePicker.noPreviewSupport: This voice has no sample preview surfaced by the provider.
voicePicker.noVoices: No voices found for this engine and locale filter.

monitorPage.title: Self-host monitor
monitorPage.description: Watch engine health, queue pressure and application logs without leaving the UI.
monitorPage.logsDescription: Tail the API/worker log file directly from the app.
monitorPage.guidanceDescription: Notes for later when you move from private self-host to public-facing infrastructure.
